item-delete-check.CheckDelete.Name: Confirm item deletions?
item-delete-check.CheckDelete.Hint: When an item is deleted from an actor's inventory post a confirm dialog before deleting. Changing this settings requires a reload
item-delete-check.Notify.Name: Chat message for item changes?
item-delete-check.Notify.Hint: Notify to chat when a player expends/adds things.
item-delete-check.JournalEntryName.Name: Changes Journal entry name
item-delete-check.JournalEntryName.Hint: If not blank, log changes to a journal entry with this name.
item-delete-check.NotifyLinkedOnly.Name: Linked Tokens Only
item-delete-check.NotifyLinkedOnly.Hint: Only Notify changes to linked token for items/charges/prepared/currency
item-delete-check.NotifyPrepared.Name: Notify spell preparation?
item-delete-check.Notify.HintPrepared: Notify when a player prepares/unprepares a spell.
item-delete-check.NotifyCurrency.Name: Notify currency change?
item-delete-check.NotifyCurrency.Hint: Notify when a player gains/loses currency.
item-delete-check.HideMessage.Name: Hide from players
item-delete-check.HideMessage.Hint: If set only GMs will see the update messages
item-delete-check.NotifySpellSlots.Name: Notify spell slot changes?
item-delete-check.NotifySpellSlots.Hint: Notify when a player gains/loses spell slots.
item-delete-check.NotifyBlackList.Name: Items to not report
item-delete-check.NotifyBlackList.Hint: If the item name includes the specified blacklist entry do not report changes. Comma separated list
item-delete-check.NotifyHitPoints.Name: Report HP Changes
item-delete-check.NotifyHitPoints.Hint: Log any hit point changes. Recommend to use log to journal entry
item-delete-check.NotifyActivityUse.Name: Notify activity use?
item-delete-check.NotifyActivityUse.Hint: Notify when an activity is used (e.g. casting a spell, making an attack).
item-delete-check.MaxLines.Name: Max lines in journal page
item-delete-check.MaxLines.Hint: If logging to a journal entry, the maximum number of lines to keep in the journal entry. 0 is unlimited.
